title: Claude Enterprise 可集中授权 MCP 连接器
full_text:
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
🚨 AI News | TestingCatalog
@testingcatalog
Claude Enterprise admins can now centrally authorize MCP connectors for their organizations via a new Enterprise-Managed Auth extension.
Mass MCP 👀
00:00
ClaudeDevs
@ClaudeDevs
14h
Replying to @ClaudeDevs In beta now with Okta and connectors from Asana, Atlassian, Canva, Figma, Granola, Linear, Slack and Supabase, with Slack coming soon. Access stays consistent across Claude chat, Claude Code, and Cowork.
Read the announcement: claude.com/blog/enterpris…
6:55 AM · Jun 19, 2026 3.1K Views
